name: Feature request
about: Propose a new configurator feature, screen, or improvement
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want to add or improve? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?
     Link to related firmware changes, CCRAN spec updates, or hardware changes
     that necessitate this feature. -->

## Proposed Approach

<!-- Initial thoughts on implementation:
     - Which screen or feature area does this touch?
     - Which BLE GATT service/characteristic is involved?
     - Relevant React libraries or browser APIs? -->

## Safety Considerations

<!-- Does this affect any of the following?
     - PO₂ setpoint configuration or validation
     - Alarm threshold configuration or range enforcement
     - Sensor calibration input or output
     - Configuration value persistence or transfer to device

     If yes, describe how correctness and range enforcement are maintained. -->

## Testing Strategy

<!-- How will this be validated?
     - Unit tests
     - Integration tests
     - Manual testing (browsers, OS) -->

## References

<!-- CCRAN protocol spec, BLE GATT profile documentation,
     relevant React/Web Bluetooth resources, dive computer standards, etc. -->
